title: MQTT node fails to connect without TLS option
symptom: The MQTT node in n8n does not establish a connection, resulting in 'No MQTT connection made'. Users are unable to connect to their MQTT broker.
applies_when: Attempting to connect to HiveMQ cluster
root_cause: The n8n MQTT node requires specific configuration for TLS connections. By default, it may not expose the TLS option directly, leading to connection failures when trying to connect to brokers that require secure connections.
fix_steps: Set the Protocol to 'mqtts' and use port 8883
Add the SSL CA Certificate from HiveMQ
Save the changes and retry the connection
agent_instruction: Configure the MQTT node to use 'mqtts' protocol with the appropriate SSL settings.
